Emily Johnson
Charlotte, NC

Summary
Dedicated and detail-oriented individual with over 5 years of experience in customer service and retail environments. Proven ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently and provide exceptional support to team members. Seeking opportunities to leverage my strong communication skills in a new field.

Experience
Sales Associate  
Target, Charlotte, NC  
June 2021 - Present  
- Assisted customers in locating products and resolving inquiries, ensuring a positive shopping experience.  
- Managed inventory and restocked shelves, contributing to efficient store operations.  
- Collaborated with team members to achieve sales goals and maintain store presentation standards.

Customer Service Representative  
Best Buy, Charlotte, NC  
March 2019 - May 2021  
- Provided technical assistance and support for customers, resolving issues effectively and promptly.  
- Maintained detailed records of customer interactions and transactions, enhancing service quality.  
- Conducted training sessions for new hires, focusing on customer engagement techniques and product knowledge.

Barista  
Starbucks, Charlotte, NC  
August 2017 - February 2019  
- Crafted high-quality beverages and provided excellent customer service in a fast-paced environment.  
- Managed cash register and handled financial transactions accurately.  
- Assisted in training new employees on store policies and procedures.
